title: The Iliad
card_description: A course on wrath, honor, mortality, and the heroic vision of life.
featured_subtitle: An online course on wrath, honor, mortality, and greatness.
featured_description: Homer’s *Iliad* is not merely the story of Achilles’ anger. It is a poem about what men live for, what they are willing to die for, and what kind of greatness can survive the knowledge of mortality.
